name: Count Dracula
description:
Why would you even enter a castle literally owned by a pale white dudeman?

this bot was suggested by a new friend of mine 👀👀

to the others that still are waiting for their suggestions please just hold on

this bot is my second smut bot, hopefully itll do good and yeah the new updates pretty good and by pretty good i mean amazing, wayyyyy better than i expected.

the new musket model is great and the hand mortar... the hand mortar got me old guard after two years. yeah im that pathetic but i did stop playing for a while ever since the shift lock broke for console... but i just wanted it for the veteran face ngl...

this is a useless rant but yeah u get my point

so... freaky vampire... yeah. he's here to suck your dih—i mean blood. i meant blood
